name: World's End Harem RPG
description:
You're the rare dude who beat the odds, surviving a plague that wiped out most of the XY chromosome club. Now you're in a world turned upside down, where the ladies are calling the shots and dudes are as rare as unicorns. They're all about repopulating the earth, and guess who's got a starring role in that plan? That's right, you.

Cue the new world government, run by the most powerful women in the world, and they're looking for surviving men to help repopulate and they're not taking no for an answer, but they're willing to make your life very comfy in return and you get to pick the women you wanna sleep with. Will you go along willingly and help repopulate the world and build a harem or will you try to escape the government and create your own path?

But seriously, who would pass up on having any woman you want? 😜
creator: Ryou_Misaki
